headline: Amazon updated 2023’s Fire HD 10 tablet with 4GB of RAM
summary: Amazon quietly upgraded its 2023 Fire HD 10 tablet. It now features 4GB of RAM, up from 3GB. This boosts performance for the budget-friendly device.

headline: While you’re watching the World Cup, the feds may be watching you
summary: World Cup and America250 events feature extensive surveillance. Spectators and host city residents may be monitored by federal authorities. Privacy concerns rise amidst widespread camera and drone usage.

headline: This slim camera has a transparent LCD screen for a viewfinder
summary: Godox launched a new slim digital camera with a unique transparent LCD viewfinder. Point-and-shoot cameras are experiencing a resurgence in popularity. This new device joins the simple camera trend, appealing to retro enthusiasts.

headline: I finally got my Trump phone
summary: The Verge received its Trump Mobile T1 Phone after a long wait. This highly anticipated 'Trump phone' is now in hand for review. Expectations were high for the device, sparking significant interest.

headline: Danganronpa 2x2 Delayed to Early 2027
summary: Spike Chunsoft announced a delay for Danganronpa 2x2. The game is now set to launch in early 2027. Fans will have to wait longer for the highly anticipated title.

headline: Heat 2 Reportedly Casts Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale
summary: Leonardo DiCaprio and Christian Bale are reportedly cast in Heat 2. They will portray Chris Shiherlis and Vincent Hanna, respectively. Filming for the sequel is planned for November 2026.

headline: Today's Top Deals: $150 Nintendo eShop Gift Card, Bose QuietComfort Headphones, and DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Camera
summary: Discover top deals including a $150 Nintendo eShop Gift Card. Score discounts on Bose QuietComfort Headphones. Find savings on the DJI Osmo Pocket 3 Camera.

headline: Marvel Rivals Fans React to New Captain America Skin
summary: NetEase Games released a controversial Captain America swimsuit skin for Marvel Rivals. Fans initially mistook a design element for a mod due to its suggestive nature. The 4th of July themed skin includes Captain America's 'big package.'

headline: Starmer Reveals 'Intensely Personal' Decision to Quit
summary: Outgoing PM Starmer shared his 'really tough' decision to resign in a candid BBC interview. He stated his political career was over, expressing personal difficulty. Starmer also issued a warning to Burnham in his first post-resignation interview.

headline: England, Mexico & Fifa in Kick-Off Time Talks
summary: England's World Cup last-16 tie against Mexico is under review for its kick-off time. Discussions are ongoing between England, Mexico, and Fifa. The match is expected to move to 19:00 BST on Sunday.

headline: Three Men Not Guilty in Lyra McKee Murder Case
summary: Three individuals were acquitted of journalist Lyra McKee's murder. McKee was shot during Londonderry rioting in April 2019. The verdict follows a high-profile investigation into her death.

headline: Nowak Killer Appeals Conviction and Sentence
summary: Vickrum Digwa, convicted of murdering student Nowak, is appealing. Digwa is currently serving a minimum 21-year sentence. The appeal seeks to challenge both the conviction and the original sentencing.
